div.head: [Untitled]
div.p: A revolution is set for July 26. The Zelayista junta in Salvador has sent an agent to procure the help of President Cabrera of Guatemala, who has been trying to defeat the Nicaragua loan project, and is cooperating with Saldivar, ex-President of Salvador, for the overthrow of Diaz. The Zelayista leader, José D. Gámez, has been conspiring with Saldivar’s daughter, Tona. The foregoing advices come from the Nicaraguan chargé d’affaires in Salvador to the President.
The Nicaraguan Government knows there are deposits of arms but can not locate them.
